_comment: Item eligibility rules for the Gwydion bid tool, seeded from the Relentless clan rules doc. Each rule applies when an item name contains any string in 'match' (case-insensitive) OR the item's pool is in 'match_pool'. When several rules apply, the STRICTEST wins: numeric requirements take the max, is_helm is ORed, categories are collected. min_rbpp_pct is a PERCENT (15 = 15%). min_rbpp_earned is lifetime RBPP (RBPP sheet 'Earned' column). Edit freely; the tool reloads it each run.
